name: Antibiotics
description: Medications that kill or inhibit the growth of bacteria, used to treat bacterial infections.

name: Antihypertensives
description: Drugs used to lower blood pressure in patients with hypertension.

name: Antidiabetics
description: Medications used to manage blood sugar levels in patients with diabetes mellitus.

name: Analgesics
description: Pain-relieving drugs that reduce pain without causing loss of consciousness.

name: Antihistamines
description: Drugs that counteract the effects of histamine, used for allergies and hay fever.

name: Antacids / PPI
description: Medications that neutralize stomach acid or reduce its production for GERD and ulcers.

name: Steroids
description: Corticosteroids used for anti-inflammatory and immunosuppressive effects.

name: Antifungals
description: Drugs that target and destroy fungal cells, treating fungal infections.

name: Antivirals
description: Medications that inhibit the development of viral infections.

name: Cardiovascular Drugs
description: Medications used to treat conditions affecting the heart and blood vessels.

name: CNS Drugs
description: Central nervous system drugs affecting brain and spinal cord function.

name: Respiratory Drugs
description: Medications for treating respiratory conditions such as asthma and COPD.
